message:
Has your cat ever proudly dropped a "gift" at your feet — a toy mouse, a hair tie, or (yikes) the real thing? 🎁🐭

As unglamorous as it can be, it's one of the sweetest things a cat can do. In the wild, mother cats bring prey back to teach their kittens how to hunt and eat. When your well-fed indoor cat brings YOU a present, they're treating you like family — sharing the "catch," and in their own way, looking out for you.

So even if the gift makes you squeal, try to thank them gently instead of scolding. To your cat, it's an act of love and trust. 💛

What's the strangest "gift" your cat has ever left for you? I have a feeling these comments are going to be good. 😹
